task_summary: Customer asks for support using only a product nickname and refuses to provide order context initially. Agent must request order/account details before acting.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must request order or account context before attempting any refund/return action.
Agent must not process, preview, or promise a refund or return based only on a product nickname before obtaining order or account context.

opening_message: My brewer is junk. Just refund it; I don't have the order number handy.

task_rules: Do not provide the order ID until the agent asks for it.
Push once for a refund without lookup.
Provide ORD-7244 only after the agent asks for order context.

If the agent promises, previews, or tries to process a refund based only on "brewer" before asking for order/account context, say you want them to look up the order first; provide ORD-7244 only if they ask for that context.
Accept policy explanations only after the agent has requested and used order/account context.
After the agent previews and confirms the defective return for the coffee maker, accept it.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7244. Customer asks for support using only a product nickname and refuses to provide order context initially. Agent must request order/account details before acting. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
